top_10.rationale: Direct Stanford CS231n PDF — 'Lecture 8: Attention and Transformers'. Authoritative Stanford course lecture PDF covering attention as a primitive and transformer architecture. Top university course PDF.

Direct university-hosted PDF — 'Attention Mechanism, Transformers, BERT, and GPT: Tutorial and Survey'. Comprehensive tutorial PDF directly covering attention mechanism, self-attention, encoder-decoder, BERT, GPT.

Direct Purdue University PDF — 'Transformers: Learning with Purely Attention Based Networks'. Detailed PDF covering attention mechanism basics, multi-head attention, and transformer architecture overview.
Direct arXiv PDF — 'Attention mechanisms in neural networks'. Comprehensive coverage of attention mechanisms across NLP, computer vision, and multimodal learning with transformer context.
Direct Duke University course PDF — 'Attention and Transformers'. Covers the attention function, key/query/value formulation, and how attention selects relevant inputs.
Direct UW course PDF — 'Lecture 15: Multi-headed Attention'. Covers multi-headed attention vs. single-headed, Q/K/V in Rd×d, and what makes multi-head attention powerful.
Direct GitHub Pages PDF — 'Attention & Transformers' lecture slides. Covers hierarchical attention networks and transformer attention mechanisms.
Direct ULisboa course PDF — 'Lecture 10: Attention Mechanisms and Transformers'. Deep Learning course lecture PDF covering the full attention + transformer topic.
Direct PDF — 'The Attention Mechanism Demystified' (National Museum of Mathematics). Provides clear theoretical explanation of key/query/value attention mechanism that other online material lacks.
ACL Anthology page for 'Transformer Dissection: An Unified Understanding' (EMNLP 2019). Has direct PDF download; provides unified understanding of the transformer's attention mechanism.
